# xenorchestra_pools (Data Source)

Use this data source to filter Xen Orchestra pools by certain criteria (tags) for use in other resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all pools
data "xenorchestra_pools" "all" {
}

# Get pools with specific tags
data "xenorchestra_pools" "tagged" {
  tags = ["production", "web"]
}

# Get all pools sorted by name
data "xenorchestra_pools" "sorted" {
  sort_by    = "name_label"
  sort_order = "asc"
}

# Use the pools data source to get pool IDs
data "xenorchestra_pools" "example" {
  tags = ["terraform-managed"]
}

data "xenorchestra_sr" "local_storage" {
  name_label = "Local storage"
  pool_id    = data.xenorchestra_pools.example.pools[0].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `sort_by` (String) The pool field to sort the results by. Supported values: `id`, `name_label`.
- `sort_order` (String) The sort order. Supported values: `asc`, `desc`. Default is `asc`.
- `tags` (Set of String) A list of tags to filter pools by. Only pools with ALL specified tags will be returned.

### Read-Only

- `pools` (Attributes List) The resulting pools after applying the argument filtering. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pools))

<a id="nestedatt--pools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pools`

Read-Only:

- `cores` (Number) Number of CPU cores in the pool.
- `default_sr` (String) The default storage repository for the pool.
- `description` (String) The description of the pool.
- `id` (String) The id of the pool.
- `master` (String) The id of the primary instance in the pool.
- `name_label` (String) The name label of the pool.
- `sockets` (Number) Number of CPU sockets in the pool.
- `tags` (List of String) The tags associated with the pool.
